## Who you are

<!-- A sentence or two about you (GitHub profile, what you build). -->

## What you want to work on

## Why write access (vs fork + PR)

<!-- Fork + PR works without any access. Explain why direct branches would help. -->

> Note: write access never bypasses review — all changes to `main` still require a pull request with an approving review and a green `build` check.
